## Summary

Describe what this PR adds or changes.

## Contribution Path

- [ ] Publish-ready (changes in resources/ + catalog/resource-index.yaml)
- [ ] Review-first (candidate in intake/normalized/)
- [ ] Raw drop (files in intake/raw/ — maintainer will run ingest-resource skill)

## Resource Metadata

For each new or updated published resource, confirm required metadata fields:

- [ ] id
- [ ] title
- [ ] summary
- [ ] tool
- [ ] task_tags
- [ ] last_reviewed

## Governance Manifest

- [ ] Manifest was generated by the ingest-resource skill (intake/manifests/<batch-id>.yaml exists)
- [ ] **OR** this is a raw-drop PR — maintainer will generate the manifest during processing.

If you created the manifest manually, verify it includes:
`sensitivity_classification`, `license_status`, `review_decision`, `reviewer`.

## Risk Gate

Check any that apply:

- [ ] sensitivity_classification is not public
- [ ] license status is missing or unclear
- [ ] gc_policy_tags includes privacy/security/procurement/legal
- [ ] source is not in catalog/trusted-sources.yaml

If any box above is checked, manual approval is required.

## Catalog Integrity

- [ ] catalog/resource-index.yaml updated for published resources
- [ ] Paths in catalog/resource-index.yaml exist
- [ ] IDs are unique

## Additional Notes

Add context reviewers should know.
